text.title: GitOps — Progressive Delivery Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on infra + metrics + cadence.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: choose-tool
step.action: Pick Flagger or Argo Rollouts with rationale.

step.name: design-strategy
step.action: Define steps + per-step duration; pick canary or blue-green.

step.name: wire-traffic-and-metrics
step.action: Configure traffic-split provider; define metric queries.

step.name: rollback-gate-validate
step.action: Set thresholds + auto-rollback; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
